title: Navarretia heterodoxa
taxonomy: Navarretia heterodoxa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It is a member of the tribe Eritrichieae, which consists of plants with five-lobed corollas and five stamens. Navarretia heterodoxa is a rare plant native to the southwestern United States, specifically in the Mojave Desert. The plant has been classified as a species of concern due to its limited range and habitat. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of Navarretia heterodoxa.
